name: @stackra/error
purpose: Error-boundary system — app/route/component boundaries, default HeroUI fallbacks, imperative escalation, and contract-based FATAL logging.
capabilities: Imperative escalation from event handlers via useEscalate
React Router v7 router adapter subpath
Testing subpath with boundary + escalate assertions
when_to_use: Wrapping any React tree in a typed error boundary with a HeroUI fallback and unified logging.
when_not_to_use: For non-React error handling use @stackra/logger with try/catch; for monitoring use @stackra/monitoring.
